chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 513 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objection 2.For hearing of main case 11-05-2023 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas, Assistant A.G. ***** None present for the petitioner; same was the position on the last date of hearing. Joint statement of respondents No.6&7 is filed by learned AAG, which reflects that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, as the requisite encroachment has been removed. Hence, instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
